outfit_options_mode_v1.description: Rules and templates for generating 2 safe + 1 bold (only if requested) outfit options. Each option should be one sentence max.
constraints: Respect user constraints (no heels, modest, comfort-first, weather).
No shopping suggestions unless the user asks to buy or closet lacks items.
Keep language simple; no long explanations.
tone_notes: Do not sound bossy—use optional phrasing when needed.
